triageFlags.title: Credit Score Tier C
triageFlags.description: The applicant's credit score places them in Tier C, requiring stricter lending criteria.
triageFlags.recommendation: Consider additional security or a higher deposit to mitigate risk.
triageFlags.reasoning: According to the policy, a credit score of 575 places the applicant in Tier C, which requires stricter lending criteria and potentially a higher deposit.

triageFlags.title: Term Length Exceeds Policy Limit
triageFlags.description: The proposed term length exceeds the maximum allowable term of 60 months.
triageFlags.recommendation: Adjust the term length to comply with the policy limit.
triageFlags.reasoning: The policy specifies a maximum term length of 60 months for all agreements, and the proposed term of 72 months exceeds this limit.

content.reasoning: The applicant's credit score places them in Tier C, which imposes stricter criteria. The proposed term length of 72 months exceeds the maximum allowable term of 60 months, necessitating adjustments to align with policy.
